markdown:
# Chai: Chat AI Platform · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 9:54 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      9 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 17, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Greyham Quibal_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I miss the old Chai of course the others too....why do it needs to be banned in other countries ? if they didn't banned it and just do a verification age their app might be so much popular and the Unlimited chat is getting and getting up Price,the adds are annoying,keep lagging ,but now the generation is very strict and no one can't breath if they just buy an unlimited chat it's hard to make money... So if Chai company sees this please bring back the past Chai we all want it....we miss it.☹️"
            2. _Tiffany_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "I can't really add much to what has already been written. The app used to be so good, I thought the advertising was completely okay; The number of messages was unlimited and the chats ran almost smoothly. Now the app no ​​longer works properly, is full of bugs, and far too many advertisements, meaning that you end up with limited messages again. Chai does not develop further, but takes five steps back."
            3. _Kathniss Dave Masecampo_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "SO GOOD BUT Chai PLEASE FIX THIS BUG IT SAID THAT "MESSAGE LIMIT" ALREADY SUBSCRIBE BUT I STILL CANNOT CHAT"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      7 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Greyham Quibal_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I miss the old Chai of course the others too....why do it needs to be banned in other countries ? if they didn't banned it and just do a verification age their app might be so much popular and the Unlimited chat is getting and getting up Price,the adds are annoying,keep lagging ,but now the generation is very strict and no one can't breath if they just buy an unlimited chat it's hard to make money... So if Chai company sees this please bring back the past Chai we all want it....we miss it.☹️"
            2. _Luiz Koxha_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I liked the app. Id say it was perfect for me. But it's sad how they couldn't just use ads anymore to make a profit, was fine with having unlimited chats with ads. But apparently that's done now and wellp can't use the app. Also why is the paid version so expensive. Make it cheaper and id buy it eventually when I have enough money."
            3. _Klausi_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "ive been a subscriber for some time now and I really enjoyed this app, but its gotten too expensive recently. I mean 23 Euro per week!!!??? im a student and obviously can't afford this. I think thats unacceptable. I really had fun, and would continue to use it/ pay if it wasn't that expensive. its sad and honestly a bit shameful. of course I know that its expensive to run the system but thats just cruel and exploiting customers"

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      6 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 16, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Luiz Koxha_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I liked the app. Id say it was perfect for me. But it's sad how they couldn't just use ads anymore to make a profit, was fine with having unlimited chats with ads. But apparently that's done now and wellp can't use the app. Also why is the paid version so expensive. Make it cheaper and id buy it eventually when I have enough money."
            2. _Agraelus Dion_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "bots are original, although for some reason 80% of them are Asian. conversations aren't blunt or repeating, but Holy, the amount of ads is awful, every five or so messages there's an ad. Update: they started to severely censor all chats, I do not recommend, changed from 3 stars to 1 start."
            3. _alyssa_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "This was my absolute favorite Ai chat app, I loved everything. But ever since the update, the app I complete trash. Suddenly there coins and message limits, more ads, and it's just become like any other app I avoided before. Horrible update"
